concept: Would you create a fighting game where combatants are constructed from modular elemental parts that reconfigure during battle based on which attacks are most successful? Each body section (arms, legs, core, head) can independently transform between solid, liquid, gaseous, and plasma states, creating hundreds of possible configurations with unique move sets. Environmental hazards can force unwanted transformations, requiring adaptation to suddenly changed combat capabilities. Winning matches cleanly awards rare elemental components with exotic properties like temporal manipulation or gravity control. The ultimate challenge is a mirror match against a perfectly adapted opponent who transforms in direct response to your every strategy.
